# BPS Tracker — Bull Put Spread Options Trading App
# https://bpstracker.com
# Developer: AI Muninn (coolthor)
# Updated: 2026-03-21

BPS Tracker is a native iOS app for tracking Bull Put Spread (BPS) options positions.
It provides real-time Greeks monitoring, IV Rank analysis, AI-powered position analysis,
and risk management tools for options traders.

## App

- Name: BPS Tracker
- Platform: iOS (App Store ID: 6757736273)
- URL: https://bpstracker.com
- Download: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757736273
- Pricing: Free (3 positions, 10 AI analyses/month) · Pro (20 positions, 200 AI/month)

## Key Concepts

- Bull Put Spread (BPS): Sell a higher-strike put + buy a lower-strike put. Collect
  premium when the underlying is stable or rising. Max loss = spread width - net credit.
- IV Rank (IVR): (Current IV - 1yr Low) / (1yr High - 1yr Low) x 100. IVR > 50%
  signals elevated premiums -- favorable for selling strategies.
- Delta: Probability proxy for assignment. BPS Tracker targets -0.10 to -0.16.
- Theta: Daily time value erosion; positive for sellers. BPS benefits from Theta accumulation.
- Vega: Sensitivity to IV changes. Entering at high IVR exploits mean reversion (IV Crush).

## Blog Articles

### Bull Put Spread Strategy

- Bull Put Spread Complete Guide: Strategy Logic to Live Trading
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/bull-put-spread-complete-guide
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/bull-put-spread-complete-guide
  Complete breakdown of BPS mechanics, entry conditions, max profit/loss, and exit rules.

- Why I Stopped Buying Stocks and Started Selling Puts Instead
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/why-i-sell-puts-instead-of-buying-stocks
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/why-i-sell-puts-instead-of-buying-stocks
  First-person account comparing stock ownership vs. cash-secured put selling for income.

- We Backtested 846 BPS Trades: 5 Findings That Changed Our Strategy
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/bps-backtest-insights
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/bps-backtest-insights
  Win rate by IVR band, DTE sweet spot, and position sizing impact from real trade history.

- How to Read BPS P&L on Your Broker: A Line-by-Line Breakdown
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/reading-bps-pnl-on-broker
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/reading-bps-pnl-on-broker
  Using Firstrade as example; debit/credit, net position, unrealized vs. realized P&L.

### IV Rank and Volatility

- What Is IV Rank? One Analogy That Makes It Click
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/iv-rank-options-trading
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/iv-rank-options-trading
  IVR with a temperature analogy; BPS entry thresholds.

- What Is Implied Volatility (IV)? A Story-First Explanation
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/implied-volatility-explained
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/implied-volatility-explained
  IV explained through insurance pricing logic; why high IV benefits premium sellers.

- What Is VIX? The Fear Index Every Options Trader Should Know
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/vix-options-trading
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/vix-options-trading
  VIX mechanics, relationship to individual stock IV, how to use it for BPS timing.

- What Is Options Skew? Why Downside Protection Always Costs More
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/options-skew
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/options-skew
  Volatility smile/smirk, why OTM puts are expensive, skew's impact on BPS pricing.

- Individual Stock Skew: Why the Same Delta Carries Different Risk on Different Stocks
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/individual-stock-skew
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/individual-stock-skew
  Skew profiles across high-vol vs. low-vol stocks; practical delta selection guidance.

### Greeks and Risk Management

- Options Greeks Explained: Delta, Theta, Vega, Gamma in Plain English
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/options-greeks-explained
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/options-greeks-explained
  Plain-language definitions with BPS-specific interpretation of each Greek.

- Options Liquidity and BPS: The Hidden Cost You're Probably Ignoring
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/options-liquidity-bps
  zh-TW: https://bpstracker.com/blog/options-liquidity-bps
  Bid-ask spread impact on BPS entry/exit; how to screen for liquid strikes.

### BPS Tracker App Features

- BPS Screener Explained: How It Reads the Market and Surfaces Trade Candidates
  https://bpstracker.com/en/blog/bps-screener-how-it-works
